doc_title: RankVicuna: Zero-Shot Listwise Document Reranking with Open-Source Large Language Models

items.evidence_span: ART, a novel approach to training a dense passage retriever starting only with questions, which outperforms the standard reference dense retrieval model DPR (Karpukhin et al., 2020)
standard reference dense retrieval model DPR (Karpukhin et al., 2020)
Our prompt template for zero-shot listwise reranking is similar to the RankGPT prompt (Sun et al., 2023)

items.fact: Qin et al. (2023) is cited for results related to PRP-Sliding-10 variants.
items.evidence_span: We directly copied results in rows (6-7) from Qin et al. (2023).
items.relevance: potential link in the citation chain
